layout.siteTitle: Fabian Montoya | Full Stack Developer & RPA
layout.siteDescription: Fabian Montoya's Portfolio - Full Stack Developer and RPA Engineer in Nicaragua. Specialized in web technologies and automation.

presentation.tagline: From elegant business websites to information systems with AI integrations.

hero.headline: Let's make your digital project happen
hero.description1: Let's build the website that will boost your business and accompany you in your digital growth. Your new users expect to meet you and you're one step away from achieving it.
promises: Business landing pages, personal portfolios, blogs, news sites and more.
Product sales or service provision systems, inventory, billing and customer management.
AI chatbot integration on your website to improve your users' experience.

experience.title: PROFESSIONAL CAREER
experience.description: Explore my professional experience and see how I have applied my skills in professional environments by optimizing processes, streamlining information management, and improving user experiences.

items.description: I developed the frontend for the company's first internal system, enabling an easy migration from spreadsheet-based workflows while maintaining compatibility with XLSX and PDF exports.
achievements: Built the frontend for the company's first internal system, replacing spreadsheet-heavy workflows with a clearer and more accessible interface. Stack: React, Tailwind CSS, shadcn-ui, react-aria.
Implemented customizable tables and guided forms to simplify data entry and daily operations. Stack: TanStack Table, TanStack Form, zustand, Zod.
Delivered PDF and XLSX exports for reports and invoices, preserving compatibility with existing business processes. Stack: jsPDF, XLSX.

items.description: I contributed to frontend projects that improved and streamlined workflows across different areas of the company, maintained the main management and organization system, and developed RPA robots and external modules for the Rocketbot platform.
achievements: Built frontend tools that improved document and patient-verification workflows, including an online editor and spreadsheet-style management interfaces. Stack: TypeScript, Angular, RxJS.
Developed RPA robots and a parallel execution system that reduced processing time while keeping resource usage low. Stack: Python, Rocketbot.
Researched NLP-based PDF data extraction to automate patient information capture from verification documents. Stack: Python, spaCy, Pydantic, pdfplumber.

projects.title: PROJECTS
projects.description: My projects, tools and information systems that I have developed for clients and for myself, with modern and scalable technologies. Some are being used by thousands of users, others are tools that have helped me improve my productivity and learn new technologies.

items.ferreteria-berrios: Dashboard for managing inventory and billing of a hardware store. Includes charts and sales reports.
items.credit-ayuda: System for registering and tracking financial credits.
items.formless: Editable and customizable form with tables and bookmarks, exportable to docx.
